transcription.text: Don't. Mess. This. Oh no! It's a cultural divide, I'ma get it on the floor. You really about to do it? Forty acres and a mule, this is bigger than the music. You really about to do it? Yeah, they tried to rig the game, but you can't fake influence. Then get on it like that. Hey, I'm trippin', I'm slidin', I'm ridin' through the back like BUS! Mustard on the beat, bro, beat, bro, any rap, uh. He a freak, oh man, damn. Now I'm callin' emberlams, tell them breathe. Let em' boys to the cross, they walk around like thieves. What's up with these new rodeo, uh, tryna see Compton. Industry can hate me, pump em' all in they mama. How many options you really got, I mean there's too many options. Let the crowd show this body I'm.
